name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Tool

If requesting a new Datadog tool:

- **Tool name**: `my-tool-name`
- **Datadog API**: (link to API docs)
- **Category**: (metrics / monitors / logs / etc.)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
